items.question: What services does BluKits Technologies provide?
items.answer: We provide end-to-end software development services including web development, mobile applications, desktop software, enterprise systems, API integration, UI/UX design, testing, cloud applications, and ongoing maintenance.

items.question: Which industries do you work with?
items.answer: We work with organisations across manufacturing, logistics, healthcare, education, retail, professional services, and other sectors that require custom software solutions.

items.question: Do you work with clients outside Vadodara?
items.answer: Yes. While our head office is in Vadodara, we serve clients across India and support remote collaboration through structured communication and project management practices.

items.question: How do you start a new project?
items.answer: We begin with a discovery discussion to understand goals, users, constraints, and success criteria. This is followed by scope definition, planning, and a phased delivery approach.

items.question: Can you work with our existing development team?
items.answer: Yes. We frequently collaborate with in-house teams, offering dedicated developers, architecture guidance, or end-to-end delivery depending on your needs.

items.question: What development methodology do you follow?
items.answer: We use agile-inspired delivery with sprint planning, regular demos, and continuous feedback. The exact cadence is adapted to project size and stakeholder availability.

items.question: How do you handle project communication?
items.answer: We assign a primary point of contact, share progress updates, maintain documentation, and conduct review meetings at agreed intervals throughout the project.

items.question: Do you provide source code and documentation?
items.answer: Yes. Upon project completion and as per the agreement, we deliver source code, deployment notes, and technical documentation required for handover.

items.question: How do you manage changes in scope?
items.answer: Scope changes are reviewed for impact on timeline and cost. We document revisions clearly and seek approval before implementation to maintain transparency.

items.question: What is your typical project timeline?
items.answer: Timelines depend on complexity, integrations, and approval cycles. Smaller modules may take a few weeks while enterprise platforms are delivered in phased milestones.

items.question: Which technologies do you use?
items.answer: We select technologies based on project requirements. Common stacks include Next.js, React, Node.js, .NET, Flutter, SQL and NoSQL databases, and major cloud platforms.

items.question: Do you build mobile apps for both Android and iOS?
items.answer: Yes. We develop native and cross-platform mobile applications based on performance, budget, and long-term maintenance considerations.

items.question: Can you integrate with third-party systems?
items.answer: Yes. We design and implement APIs and integrations with CRMs, ERPs, payment gateways, authentication providers, and other enterprise systems.

items.question: How do you approach application security?
items.answer: Security is considered during architecture, development, and testing. We follow secure coding practices, access control principles, and validation suitable for each application type.

items.question: Do you offer software testing services?
items.answer: Yes. Our QA services include functional testing, regression testing, API validation, and test documentation to support reliable releases.

items.question: Do you provide post-launch support?
items.answer: Yes. We offer maintenance and support plans covering bug fixes, minor enhancements, monitoring assistance, and planned updates after go-live.

items.question: How do we request a project estimate?
items.answer: Share your requirements through our contact form or email. We will schedule a discussion and provide a proposal outlining scope, approach, and indicative timelines.

items.question: What information should we share for an accurate quote?
items.answer: Helpful inputs include business objectives, target users, key features, integrations, preferred platforms, and any existing systems or designs you already have.

items.question: Do you sign non-disclosure agreements?
items.answer: Yes. We are open to NDAs when required to protect confidential business information shared during discovery and development.

items.question: How can we get started with BluKits Technologies?
items.answer: Contact us via the website form or email at info@blukits.com. We will respond to schedule an initial consultation and outline the next steps.
